languages.text: "Пусть меровцы перейдут в наступление. Снабдите их всех необходимым — человечество покорит мир".
"Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."
languages.original_text: "Пусть меровцы перейдут в наступление. Снабдите их всех необходимым — человечество покорит мир".

traits.locale_text: "Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."
"Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."
"Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."

languages.text: 「メロヴィン族に攻撃を仕掛けさせよう。彼らに必要なものをすべて供給すれば、人類は世界を制圧するだろう」
languages.original_text: "Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."

traits.locale_text: 「メロヴィング族に攻撃を仕掛けさせよう。彼らに必要なものをすべて供給すれば、人類は世界を制圧するだろう。」

languages.text: «Que los merovianos pasen a la ofensiva. Proporciónenles todo lo necesario y la Humanidad conquistará este mundo».
languages.original_text: "Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."

traits.locale_text: «Que los merovianos pasen a la ofensiva. Proporciónenles todo lo necesario y la Humanidad conquistará este mundo».

languages.text: “允许梅罗夫人发动进攻，为他们提供一切所需物资。人类必将征服这个世界。”
languages.original_text: "Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."

traits.locale_text: “允许梅罗夫人发动进攻，为他们提供一切所需物资。人类必将征服这个世界。”

languages.text: "Gebt den Merovianern den Befehl zum Angriff. Versorgt sie mit allem, was sie brauchen, dann wird die Menschheit diese Welt erobern."
languages.original_text: "Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."

traits.locale_text: "Gebt den Merovianern den Befehl zum Angriff. Versorgt sie mit allem, was sie brauchen, dann wird die Menschheit diese Welt erobern."

languages.text: "Merovlular saldırıya geçsin. Hepsine ihtiyaç duydukları malzemeleri sağlayın, İnsanlık dünyayı fethedecek."
languages.original_text: "Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."

traits.locale_text: "Merovlular saldırıya geçsin. Hepsine ihtiyaç duydukları malzemeleri sağlayın, İnsanlık dünyayı fethedecek."

languages.text: « Laissez les Meroviens mener l'assaut. Fournissez-leur tout ce dont ils ont besoin. L'humanité conquerra ce monde. »
languages.original_text: "Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."

traits.locale_text: « Laissez les Meroviens mener l'assaut. Fournissez-leur tout ce dont ils ont besoin. L'humanité conquerra ce monde. »
